_publications._publicationTitle: RENOVO-NF1 accurately predicts NF1 missense variant pathogenicity.

_contextSnippet: On the 2020 test set, accuracy was 93%, with only 4/57 inaccurate or uncertain predictions
details: Achieved 93% accuracy on the 2020 test set (n=57), with only 4/57 inaccurate or uncertain predictions
